description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a wooden privacy fence and landscaped with shrubs and coniferous trees. The exterior features a mix of wood paneling and white walls, with large glass doors and windows providing natural light to the interior spaces. The house includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof, and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The backyard is enclosed and features a green lawn area, while the front is more open with direct access to the street. The overall design is minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces. The house is set on a flat, concrete base, typical for urban residential lots.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with wood and white exterior walls, large windows, and a fenced yard landscaped with trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, and the wooden fence with landscaping along the perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the segmented interior layout, visible rooms, and the depth of the fenced yard with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the backyard lawn, rear-facing windows, and the continuous wooden fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entry, additional rooms, and the green space along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass doors and windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass door, no steps, and is integrated into the wooden fence with minimal decorative elements.
